column3: Requirement Description
The system shall allow users to select their preferred currency from a dropdown menu for localized pricing.
The system shall provide functionality for users to register, log in, and manage their accounts securely.
The system shall allow logged-in users to add items to a wishlist for future reference.
The system shall provide a shopping cart feature where users can add, update, and remove products before checkout.
The system shall allow users to search for products using a search bar with autocomplete suggestions.
The system shall display main product categories (e.g., Computers, Electronics, Apparel, Digital Downloads, Books, Jewelry, Gift Cards) for easy navigation.
The system shall display promotional banners on the homepage to highlight featured products and offers.
The system shall display product images, descriptions, and prices in categorized sections on the homepage.
The system shall provide a 'Learn More' button on promotional banners that redirects users to detailed product pages.
The system shall provide a documentation link for users to access guides and FAQs about the platform.
The system shall provide a link to the nopCommerce forums where users can engage in discussions and seek support.
The system shall support a product carousel feature to showcase multiple promotional items dynamically.
The system shall provide a contact link or customer support access for user inquiries and issues.
The system shall allow users to search for products using a keyword input field.
The system shall provide an 'Advanced Search' option to refine search results based on additional criteria.
The system shall display search results with product images, names, and prices.
The system shall allow users to add a product to the shopping cart from the search results page.
The system shall allow users to sort search results based on criteria such as price, relevance, and ratings.
The system shall allow users to choose the number of results displayed per page (e.g., 6, 12, etc.).
The system shall display product ratings based on customer reviews.
The system shall provide a sidebar listing product categories for quick navigation.
The system shall allow users to filter search results by manufacturer (e.g., Apple, HP).
The system shall provide a 'Popular Tags' section to help users discover products based on trending keywords.
The system shall allow users to select a preferred currency for price display.
The system shall provide options to switch between grid and list views for search results.
The system shall provide access to user authentication features, including login and registration, from the header.
The system shall allow logged-in users to add products to a wishlist from the search results.
The system shall display detailed product information, including name, image, description, specifications, and price.
The system shall allow users to add the selected product to the shopping cart.
The system shall allow users to specify the quantity of the product before adding it to the cart.
The system shall provide an option for logged-in users to add the product to their wishlist.
The system shall allow users to add the product to a comparison list.
The system shall allow users to share product details via email.
The system shall provide breadcrumb navigation to help users track their location within the site hierarchy.
The system shall display product ratings and reviews.
The system shall allow only registered users to submit reviews.
The system shall provide an option for users to select the address they want to ship to before adding the product to the cart.
The system shall display the SKU (Stock Keeping Unit) for the product.
The system shall display the shopping cart with product details, including SKU, image, name, price, quantity, total price, and remove option.
The system shall allow users to update the quantity of items in the shopping cart.
The system shall allow users to remove items from the shopping cart.
The system shall provide an option to select gift wrapping for products in the shopping cart.
The system shall allow users to apply discount codes to their order.
The system shall allow users to redeem gift cards by entering a gift card code.
The system shall provide a 'Continue Shopping' button to allow users to return to product browsing.
The system shall provide an 'Estimate Shipping' button to calculate potential shipping costs before checkout.
The system shall display an order summary, including sub-total, shipping cost, tax, and total amount.
The system shall provide a 'Checkout' button for users to proceed to the checkout process.
The system shall require users to agree to the terms of service before proceeding to checkout.
The system shall allow users to proceed to checkout as a guest without requiring account registration.
The system shall provide a registration option for users to create an account for future convenience.
The system shall provide a login form for returning customers to access their accounts.
The system shall provide a 'Remember Me' checkbox to allow users to stay logged in on future visits.
The system shall provide a 'Forgot Password' link for users to reset their password if needed.
The system shall validate email and password fields to ensure correct user input.
The system shall implement security measures such as encryption and protection against brute-force attacks during login.
The system shall display appropriate error messages when invalid credentials are entered.
The system shall provide a button to allow users to continue to checkout as a guest.
The system shall provide a button to allow new users to register for an account.
The system shall provide a button to allow returning users to log in.

The system shall provide a form for users to enter their billing address details, including first name, last name, email, company, country, state, city, address, postal code, phone number, and fax number.
The system shall enforce mandatory fields (marked with an asterisk) to ensure essential billing information is provided before proceeding.
The system shall provide dropdown menus for selecting country and state to ensure proper address format.
The system shall provide an option for users to use the same billing address for shipping.
The system shall provide a 'Continue' button to proceed to the next step in the checkout process.
The system shall validate all entered information to ensure completeness and correct formatting before allowing the user to continue.
The system shall verify that the email address entered follows a valid email format.
The system shall validate the zip/postal code based on the selected country.
The system shall support international addresses by allowing users to select their country and input the appropriate details.
The system shall allow users to select a shipping method from available options (e.g., Ground, Next Day Air, 2nd Day Air).
The system shall provide a brief description of each shipping method to inform users about the delivery type.
The system shall pre-select a default shipping method for user convenience.
The system shall provide a 'Back' button to allow users to return to the previous step in the checkout process.
The system shall provide a 'Continue' button to allow users to proceed to the next step in the checkout process.
The system shall display the cost of each shipping method (even if $0.00) to ensure transparency in pricing.
The system shall ensure that a shipping method is selected before allowing users to continue to the next step.
The system shall allow users to select a payment method from available options (e.g., Check/Money Order, Credit Card).
The system shall provide a brief description of each payment method to inform users about the payment process.
The system shall pre-select a default payment method for user convenience.
The system shall provide a 'Back' button to allow users to return to the previous step in the checkout process.
The system shall provide a 'Continue' button to allow users to proceed to the next step in the checkout process.
The system shall ensure that a payment method is selected before allowing users to continue to the next step.
The system shall allow users to select a credit card type from a dropdown menu.
The system shall provide an input field for users to enter the name on the credit card.
The system shall provide an input field for users to enter their credit card number.
The system shall provide dropdown menus for users to select the expiration month and year of the credit card.
The system shall provide an input field for users to enter the card's security code (CVV).
The system shall provide a 'Back' button to allow users to return to the previous step in the checkout process.
The system shall provide a 'Continue' button to allow users to proceed to the next step in the checkout process.
The system shall validate all credit card details before allowing users to proceed to the next step.
The system shall ensure secure handling of credit card information using encryption and compliance with PCI DSS.
The system shall display details of the ordered products, including SKU, image, product name, price, quantity, and total cost.
The system shall calculate and display the order total, including subtotal, shipping cost, tax, and final total amount.
The system shall provide a 'Back' button to allow users to return to the previous step in the checkout process.
The system shall validate that billing and shipping addresses are correctly displayed before order confirmation.
The system shall display the selected payment method for user verification before order confirmation.
The system shall display the selected shipping method for user verification before order confirmation.
The system shall ensure that all order details are correct before allowing users to confirm the order.
The system shall display a summary of the order, including order number, order date, order status, and total order amount.
The system shall display the billing and shipping address details of the user.
The system shall display the selected payment method and its current status.
The system shall display the selected shipping method and its current status.
The system shall display details of the purchased products, including SKU, image, product name, price, quantity, and total cost.
The system shall provide a 'Print' button to allow users to print their order details.
The system shall provide a 'PDF Invoice' button to allow users to download their order invoice as a PDF.
The system shall provide a 'Re-order' button to allow users to place the same order again.
The system shall display the current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped).
The system shall provide a sitemap page that lists all key sections and categories of the website.
The system shall display links to general pages such as Home, Search, News, Blog, Contact Us, and My Account.
The system shall list product categories such as Computers, Electronics, Apparel, Digital Downloads, Books, Jewelry, and Gift Cards.
The system shall provide a section listing available manufacturers (e.g., Apple, HP, Nike).
The system shall ensure that all sitemap entries are clickable links that direct users to the corresponding sections.
The system shall support search engine indexing of the sitemap for improved discoverability.
The system shall ensure the sitemap page is responsive and accessible on both desktop and mobile devices.
The system shall comply with web accessibility standards to ensure usability for all users.
The system shall provide a brief description at the top of the sitemap page explaining its purpose.
The system shall provide a registration form for users to create an account.
The system shall allow users to select their gender (Male/Female).
The system shall provide input fields for first name, last name, date of birth, and email address.
The system shall enforce mandatory fields (marked with an asterisk) to ensure essential details are provided.
The system shall provide an optional input field for users to enter their company name.
The system shall provide an option for users to subscribe to newsletters.
The system shall allow users to create a password with input fields for password and confirm password.
The system shall validate password strength to ensure secure account creation.
The system shall provide a 'Register' button to submit the registration form.
The system shall provide a wishlist page displaying saved products.
The system shall allow users to select items from their wishlist and add them to the shopping cart.
The system shall display product details in the wishlist, including SKU, image, name, price, quantity, and total.
The system shall allow users to update their wishlist to modify item quantities.
The system shall provide a remove button to allow users to delete items from their wishlist.
The system shall generate a unique URL for users to share their wishlist with others.
The system shall allow users to email their wishlist to a friend.
The system shall provide a contact form for users to submit inquiries.
The system shall provide an input field for users to enter their name.
The system shall provide an input field for users to enter their email address.
The system shall provide a text area for users to enter their inquiry message.
The system shall enforce mandatory fields (marked with an asterisk) to ensure essential details are provided before form submission.
The system shall provide a 'Submit' button to allow users to send their inquiries.
The system shall send an email notification to the support team when an inquiry is submitted.
The system shall provide a news page displaying recent updates and announcements.
The system shall display the title and publication date of each news article.
The system shall display a summary of each news article below its title.
The system shall provide a 'Details' button for each news article, allowing users to view the full content.
The system shall provide an RSS feed link to allow users to subscribe to news updates.
The system shall display news articles in reverse chronological order (newest first).
The system shall provide a blog page displaying recent blog posts.
The system shall display the title and publication date of each blog post.
The system shall display a short preview of each blog post below its title.
The system shall provide a 'Details' button for each blog post, allowing users to view the full content.
The system shall display the number of comments for each blog post and allow users to interact with posts.
The system shall support blog post tags to help users filter and find relevant content.
The system shall provide a blog archive allowing users to browse posts by date.
The system shall provide an RSS feed link to allow users to subscribe to blog updates.
